qa_pairs.question: How do I select a single file or directory for transfer in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: To select a single file or directory for transfer, single-click on it.

qa_pairs.question: How can I highlight multiple files or directories for a Globus transfer?
qa_pairs.answer: You can highlight multiple files or directories by control-clicking on them.

qa_pairs.question: What action initiates a file transfer in Globus after selecting files?
qa_pairs.answer: After highlighting the desired files or directories, click on one of the big blue buttons with white arrowheads to initiate the transfer.

qa_pairs.question: What happens immediately after a Globus transfer is initiated?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a Globus transfer is initiated, the transfer job will be given a unique ID and will begin right away.

qa_pairs.question: How will I know when my Globus file transfer is complete?
qa_pairs.answer: You will receive an email when your Globus file transfer is complete.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I monitor the progress of my Globus transfers or view details of completed transfers?
qa_pairs.answer: You can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the 'Activity' button on the left.
